PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?player ?playerLabel ?birthYear ?careerAverage WHERE {
  wd:Q291311 p:P1542 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1542 ?player .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?seasonStart .
  FILTER(YEAR(?seasonStart) = 2019)

  ?player wdt:P569 ?birthDate .

  .
  ?player wdt:P2477 ?careerAverage .
  ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?playerLabel) , "en"))
}
ORDER BY ?playerLabel
